sentences.arabic: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ الشَّرْعِيِّ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْعِبَادَاتِ الَّتِي تُقَرِّبُنَا إِلَى اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Traženje vjerskog znanja je jedan od najvećih ibadeta koji nas približavaju Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: Seeking Islamic knowledge is one of the greatest acts of worship that bring us closer to Allah.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: «مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الذِّكْرِ وَالدُّعَاءِ، رَقْمُ ٢٦٩٩].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Ko krene putem tražeći na njemu znanje, Allah će mu olakšati put do Dženneta' [Muslim, Knjiga o zikru i dovi, br. 2699].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever follows a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise' [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Dhikr and Supplication, No. 2699].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ أُمُورَ دِينِهِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ مِنَ الْكُتُبِ الْمُعْتَمَدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora ispravno učiti o stvarima svoje vjere iz pouzdanih knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must learn the matters of his religion correctly from reliable books.

sentences.arabic: الْعِلْمُ يَنْفَعُ الْإِنْسَانَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَيَرْفَعُ دَرَجَتَهُ فِي الْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Znanje koristi čovjeku na ovom svijetu i podiže mu stepene na ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: Knowledge benefits a person in this world and raises his status in the Hereafter.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الشَّيْخُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ دَائِمًا بِالْبَحْثِ عَنِ الْأَحَادِيثِ الصَّحِيحَةِ لِفَهْمِ الدِّينِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Albani je uvijek savjetovao traženje vjerodostojnih hadisa radi razumijevanja vjere.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh al-Albani always advised searching for authentic hadiths to understand the religion.
